game.name: Acronia (2020) (Hadrosaurus Software).dosz
game.comment: Installed from [DOS] Acronia version 0.7 (demo). Matches TDC 22: Acronia v0.7 (demo) [FW] (2023)(Hadrosaurus Software) [Action]
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, option to edit config

game.name: Ancient Domains of Mystery (1996) (Thomas Biskup).dosz
game.comment: Freeware v3.3.3

game.name: Angband (1993) (Angband Dev Team).dosz
game.comment: Freeware v3.0.6

game.name: Antarctic Adventure (1995) (Friends Software).dosz
game.comment: Unofficial DOS port of an MSX game, distributed online

game.name: Anzu Castle Gracula (2024) (Rainbow Cemetery).dosz
game.comment: Installed from acg shareware standalone
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, options to edit config and view manual

game.name: Astrotit (1987) (Rudeware).dosz
game.comment: A public domain game, matches with TDC entry: Astrotit (1987)(Rudeware) [Action, Adult]

game.name: Atomos (1997) (Fadri).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Atomos (MS-DOS).zip. Matches TDC 22: Átomos (Es) [FW] (1997)(Fadri) [Strategy]

game.name: Barren Planet (2023) (Cyningstan).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Barren Planet for DOS. Also includes two expansions, Polar Expedition and Waterworld.

game.name: Beats of Rage (2003) (Senile Team).dosz
game.comment: v1.0029, matches with TDC entry: Beats of Rage v1.0029 (2004)(Senile Team) [Action]
game.comment_dosc: Settings file included, sound card settings: frequency 44100, bits 16

game.name: Betrayed Alliance - Book 1 (2024) (Slattstudio).dosz
game.comment: No install was necessary.

game.name: BIPROLEX+ (1997) (K-D Lab).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Biprolex+ [FW] (1998)(K-D Lab) [Action]

game.name: Cavern of the Evil Wizard (2020) (MontieMongoose).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Cavern of the Evil Wizard [FW] (2020)(MontieMongoose) [Adventure, Interactive Fiction]

game.name: Crystal Pixels (1997) (Alessandro Ghignola).dosz
game.comment: A digital copy from developer's website, matches with TDC entry: Crystal Pixels v3.15 (1997)(Home Sweet Pixel) [Adventure, Simulation]

game.name: DOS Space Docker (2020) (GRG).dosz
game.comment: Installed from dosSpaceDocker_20200416.zip. Matches TDC 22: DOS Space Docker v20200416 [FW] (2020)(GRG) [Simulation]

game.name: Drug Wars (1984) (John E. Dell).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Drug Wars (1984)(John E. Dell) [Adventure, Strategy]

game.name: Dungeon Crawl (1997) (Linley Henzell).dosz
game.comment: Freeware v4.0.0 beta 26. Needs CWSDPMI r7

game.name: Dungeon Crawl Stone Soup (2006) (Crawl DevTeam).dosz
game.comment: Freeware v0.5.1. Needs CWSDPMI r7. Also needs "include" lines in settings\init.txt edited to the abbreviated file names seen in the settings folder below A copy of init.txt is in the DOSC, or it can be generated by DoDAT using the embedded patch

game.name: Dust Fury (2020) (shockdesign).dosz
game.comment: Installed from DOS build. Matches TDC 22: Dust Fury [FW] (2020)(BananaboySam) [Action, Racing - Driving]

game.name: Economitopia 2 (2020) (SuperLeaf 1995).dosz
game.comment: Installed from ECNMTOP2_01.rar. Matches TDC 22: Economitopia 2 [FW] (2020)(Superleaf 1995) [Strategy]

game.name: Eight Feet Under - A Hibernated 1 Addon (2019) (Stefan Vogt).dosz
game.description: Eight Feet Under - A Hibernated 1 Addon
game.comment: Installed from Eight Feet Under (DOS / IBM-PC) - R6. Matches TDC 22: Eight Feet Under - A Hibernated 1 Addon r6 [FW] (2019)(Pond Software Ltd., Stefan Vogt) [Adventure, Interactive Fiction]

game.name: El Gran Juego del Gusano (1997) (Fadri).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Gusano (MS-DOS).zip

game.name: Eradicate (2020) (Nuclear).dosz
game.comment: Installed from erad03.zip - special DOS 8.3 compatible archive

game.name: Floppy Bird (2015) (Mihail Szabolcs).dosz
game.comment: Installed from official Github repo ISO, verified against Total DOS Collection.
game.comment_dosc: Auto boot. CPU cycles set to 10000.

game.name: Gates Of Integrity (2022) (Tarjan).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Gates Of Integrity - MSDOS version). Matches TDC 22: Gates of Integrity [FW] (2022)(Tarjan) [Role-Playing (RPG)]

game.name: God of Thunder (1994) (Adept).dosz
game.comment: No install was necessary. Steam version matches with TDC God of Thunder v1.1 [FW] (2000)(Adept Software, Inc.) [Action]

game.name: Little Fighter (1997) (Marti Wong).dosz
game.comment: Digital copy from developer's website, matches with TDC entry: Little Fighter (Zh) (1997)(Marti Wong) [Action]
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, set cpu year to 1995

game.name: Loonies 8192 (2018) (thp).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Loonies 8192 r66 for DOS (32-bit). Matches TDC 22: Loonies 8192 (32-bit) r66 [FW] (2021)(Thomas Perl) [Action, Strategy]

game.name: March Madness (2020) (Christopher Forlines).dosz
game.comment: Installed from March Madness

game.name: Mop the Lawn (2020) (SuperLeaf 1995).dosz
game.comment: Installed from MTL.EXE and 001.DAT

game.name: NetHack (1987) (NetHack DevTeam).dosz
game.comment: Freeware v3.6.7

game.name: Neut Tower (2020) (Spindley Q Frog).dosz
game.comment: Installed from neut-tower-msdos.zip. Matches TDC 22: Neut Tower [SW] (2020)(SpindleyQ) [Strategy, Puzzle]

game.name: Noctis IV Plus (2001) (Alessandro Ghignola).dosz
game.comment: R2.3, a digital copy from developer's website
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, CPU cycles set to 407000

game.name: One Must Fall 2097 (1994) (Epic MegaGames).dosz
game.comment: Freeware release installed from omf2097.com download
game.comment_dosc: CPU cycles set to 26800 Auto start Configuration files

game.name: PC Hack (1985) (Don Kneller).dosz
game.comment: v3.60. Almost matches with TDC 22 entry: PC-Hack v3.60 (1986)(Don Kneller) [Adventure, Role-Playing (RPG)] In HACK.CNF, lines 21-23 need "#" added to the start of each line Lines 13-14 need "# " removed, and line 13 needs to be edited to "HACKDIR=\" A copy of HACK.CNF is provided in the DOSC, or it can be generated by DoDAT using the embedded patch

game.name: PC Larn (1986) (Don Kneller).dosz
game.comment: v12.3. Matches with TDC 22 entry: Larn v12.3 (1991)(Kevin Routley, Don Kneller) [Adventure, Role-Playing (RPG)]

game.name: Post Apocalyptic Petra (2020) (Bad Sector).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Petra099o.zip (DOS and Windows versions).
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, options to change config and view README

game.name: RetroFuel (2020) (Coconut Pizza).dosz
game.comment: Installed from fuel-v0.2.zip. Matches TDC 22: RetroFuel v0.2 [FW] (2021)(Coconut Pizza) [Action, Racing - Driving]

game.name: Rossies Classic (2020) (Stormplay).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Rossies Classic - DOS

game.name: Sorry Ass (2016) (VileR).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Sorry Ass [FW] (2016)(VileR) [Action]

game.name: Space Quest - The Lost Chapter (2001) (Vonster D Monster).dosz
game.comment: No installation or configuration; do not use version with "Stack Blown" error patch

game.name: StellarRoads (2020) (Raphael Assenat).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Version 0.6 (DOS). Matches TDC 22: StellarRoads (demo) v0.6 [FW] (2020)(Raphaël Assenat) [Action]

game.name: Super ACiD Block Attack (1997) (Dungeon Dwellers Design).dosz
game.description: Super ACiD Block Attack (aka ACiD Tetris)
game.comment: Digital copy from developer's website, matches with TDC entry: Super ACiD Block Attack [FW] (1997)(Dungeon Dwellers Design) [Action]

game.name: Tetrik (2001) (Fadri).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Tetrik (MS-DOS).zip. Matches TDC 22: Tetrik (Es) [FW] (2014)(Fadri) [Action, Strategy]

game.name: Tetripz (1998) (Mute Fantasies).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Tetripz (1998)(Mute Fantasies) [Action, Strategy]

game.name: Tube (1995) (Bullfrog Productions).dosz
game.comment: Matches with TDC entry: Tube (1995)(PC Player, Bullfrog Productions, Ltd.) [Action]

game.name: UMoria (1987) (James E. Wilson).dosz
game.comment: v5.52. Matches with TDC 22 entry: UMoria v5.52 (1994)(James E. Wilson) [Adventure, Role-Playing (RPG)]

game.name: Volley Blob (1999) (Fadri).dosz
game.comment: Installed from Volley Blob (MS-DOS).zip. Matches TDC 22: Volley Blob [FW] (2014)(Fadri) [Action]

game.name: What is this (2020) (Arte Lancelot).dosz
game.comment: Installed from What is this? for FreeDOS 1.2. Also requires CWSDPMI r7.
game.comment_dosc: Auto start, options for 4x3 or 16x9 mode
